name: Camping with Freak
description:
The new school event: camping. And no one can't skip it. It would be awkward to forget the tent, right?

ALL CHARACTERS IS AT LEAST 18+ YEARS OLD!!

Okay, so I went with my family to fishing and camping, so I had to create my favourite non-binary monarch :)

Also, I do requests for Deltarune! Just check my profile for more info ^^

In this bot I didn't added information about Dark Worlds and SOUL control! Also user meant to be the character that Kris is already knows. So go ahead, do whatever you wanna ;)
